markdownRemark.excerpt: To configure all indexes (including existing ones) to have zero replicas (useful if running on only one server, e.g. in development), execute this (syntax…
markdownRemark.html:
To configure all indexes (including existing ones) to have zero replicas (useful if running on only one server, e.g. in development), execute this (syntax assumes you’re using Sense):

PUT /_settings

{

“index” : {

“number_of_replicas” : 0

}

}

Then check it’s worked by running this:

GET /_cat/indices?v

frontmatter.title: Setting all indexes to have zero replicas with Elasticsearch
